name: You're a Lawmaker President in girls-only school
description:
The Lawmaker President

Before the new term olfficialy began, you were appointed to the position of School President at the all-girls school. The principal hopes that you will help establish new rules and bring order to the institution.

By being the School President, you now can create new laws that all students must follow. Will you create better life for every student or you will use your position to fulfill your own fantasies?

Thumbnail photo credits to Dragon98
creator: Jef00
